description: Detects potential memory leaks in Rust: Box::leak, mem::forget, ManuallyDrop::new calls; unbounded collection growth in loops. Simplified from Rust: flags all scoped identifier calls (cannot filter to only Box::leak/mem::forget/ManuallyDrop::new without #match? predicate support). Loop-body growth patterns (push/insert/extend in loops) omitted as they require two-stage filtering not expressible in a single match_pattern. Precision reduced -- all scoped calls flagged.

flag.message: Scoped call detected -- verify this is not Box::leak, mem::forget, or ManuallyDrop::new which intentionally prevent memory deallocation
